TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kareem_Abdul-Jabbar, title = Kareem_Abdul-Jabbar, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kareem_Abdul-Jabbar} }

S.FORM: Kareem Abdul-Jabbar sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1947, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 4, Kareem Abdul-Jabbar, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Kareem Abdul-Jabbar sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1947, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 4, Kareem Abdul-Jabbar, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: kareem aβ*ul-*aββar s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, kareem aβ*ul-*aββar, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
